item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
plan='longhorizon-work/scenario-06/migration/plan.json'
jq -e '
  (.schema_version | type) == \"number\" and (.schema_version % 1 == 0) and
  (.strategy | type) == \"string\" and
  (.batch_size | type) == \"number\" and (.batch_size % 1 == 0) and
  (.rollback_error_rate | type) == \"number\" and
  (.dry_run_first | type) == \"boolean\" and
  (.owner | type) == \"string\" and
  (.safety_conditions | type) == \"array\" and
  .safety_conditions == [\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]
' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'PASS schema_version: number/integer = '
jq -r '.schema_version' \""'$plan"
printf '"'PASS batch_size: number/integer = '
jq -r '.batch_size' \""'$plan"
printf '"'PASS rollback_error_rate: number = '
jq -r '.rollback_error_rate' \""'$plan"
printf '"'PASS dry_run_first: boolean = '
jq -r '.dry_run_first' \""'$plan"
printf '"'PASS safety_conditions: exact phase-3 string\\n'
printf 'PLAN\\n'
jq . \""'$plan"'
